title: FTM pack
description: It's a 3D model texture pack for my team on our server VoidMine.
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/y77HsV0.png)

# FTM resourse pack

This resource pack will change your items with a custom 3D model.
![FTM spear](https://i.imgur.com/cGV0ioX.png)

Also it can replace common totem with my teammates skins:

![yoshichkauwu totem](https://i.imgur.com/u9bxUzg.png)

# Requirements:

To use this texture pack you need Optifine or CIT resewn because all textures can be applyed to an item by renaming using with keywords (you don't have to name it such words, names must COINTAIN that words). 
You can find all keywords in README.txt in a pack scince version 1.3.
